title: 237Builds Company Directory
description: Schema for data/companies.json - one entry per startup shown on the site. Run `npm run validate:data` to check this file against it.

id.description: Unique identifier. Must not collide with any other entry's id (checked separately from schema validation).

category.description: Must exactly match one of the data-category values on the filter buttons in index.html (lowercase).

logo.description: Absolute http(s) URL, a site-relative path starting with '/', or an empty string.

tags.description: Optional. Short keywords shown on the startup's detail page, e.g. ["B2B", "mobile money"].

team.description: Optional. Team members shown on the detail page, e.g. ["Jane Doe - CEO"].
